title: CSS Art: Mountain Scene
description: Build a mountain landscape scene using only CSS - gradients, clip-paths, shadows, and pseudo-elements (no images)

hints.text: Layer elements with position: absolute. Use gradients for sky and ground, clip-path: polygon() for mountain silhouettes, border-radius: 50% and box-shadow for the glowing sun.
Sky: linear-gradient(to bottom, midnightblue, skyblue). Sun: gold circle with box-shadow glow. Mountains: clip-path with polygon points. Ground: green gradient.
Layer sky, sun, mountains, and ground with absolute positioning and CSS-only effects.
